title: Velvety Savory Syrian Chickpeas Stew
description: A creamy, umami-packed Syrian chickpea stew enriched with a zesty chimichurri sauce, simmered low-sodium and finished with a fragrant temper for a crowd-pleasing comfort dish.

ingredients.name: chimichurri sauce
ingredients.notes: made with parsley, cilantro, vinegar, oil, oregano, pepper

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and sauté for another 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in smoked paprika, cumin, and coriander, cooking for 1 minute to toast the spices.
Pour in tomato sauce, vegetable broth, and chickpeas. Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
While the stew simmers, whisk the chimichurri sauce: combine chopped parsley, cilantro, red wine vinegar, remaining olive oil, oregano, pepper, and a pinch of salt.
After simmering, stir in tahini for a velvety texture and let the stew cook for another 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Finish by pouring the chimichurri sauce into the pot, stirring to combine, and adjusting seasoning if needed. Serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh parsley.
